title: Linux LD_PRELOAD Library Hijacking
description: Detects LD_PRELOAD environment variable injection or /etc/ld.so.preload modification, used for library hijacking and process injection.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*LD_PRELOAD=*' or msg like '*/etc/ld.so.preload*' or msg like '*ld.so.preload*')))
